title: IVR Call Result
description: IVR v1 call result contract. IVR result is an input signal only and must be handed off to Core Order State Machine or human review by policy.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09 and TECH-09. IVR result cannot update order state, cancel order, confirm payment, confirm verified revenue, send notification by itself, or feed ROAS as revenue.

core_order_handoff_required.description: Whether result must be handed off to Core Order State Machine.

input_signal_only.description: Invariant: IVR result is input signal only.

no_direct_order_update.description: Invariant: IVR must not directly update order state.

no_payment_or_revenue_effect.description: Invariant: IVR must not confirm payment or verified revenue.
